title: (Kor, Chi, Jpn, Eng) 독서, 내 인생의 지도를 찾아서 | 나민애 서울대학교 기초교육원 교수 | 추천 강연 강의 듣기 | 세바시 1917회
text:
I am about to cry now, 
and this is a sort of family thing In my house, there is one
who cries a lot more than me It is my father who cries
while walking around I asked him,
'Father, who am I?' 'Oh, I need to go and write a poem'
and he went away While living, what I desired the most was having a guide in life The whole world is telling me that
I am not an absolute existence 'then why am I living here?' 
I asked

title: (Kor, Chi, Jpn, Eng) 독서, 내 인생의 지도를 찾아서 | 나민애 서울대학교 기초교육원 교수 | 추천 강연 강의 듣기 | 세바시 1917회
text:
Father, who am I?' 'Oh, I need to go and write a poem'
and he went away While living, what I desired the most was having a guide in life The whole world is telling me that
I am not an absolute existence 'then why am I living here?' 
I asked myself [applause] Hello Yes, hello Hello, everyone Do you all know my name? Yes I don't know your names Thus, I will stand outside 
after this speech If you tell me your name, I will greet you Oh you don't need to clap I do not know how you found me out I guess you would have thought
'Oh, she was in a tv show' or 'I like her father more than her' Yes, I think you have thought that way A while ago, I went on a show called 
"You Quiz" and got this money as a prize It was an envelope 
filled with ten-dollar bills One day my father looked at the envelope The money was all spent He was looking at it and told me to sell the envelope to him So I asked how much
he will give me He then answered
'100 dollars' I told him I am not selling It was not worth
100 dollars He then raised the price 200 dollars I remained still
- '300 dollars' I said I am not selling as I thought the price
would keep going up The reason why I said so is because the envelope
is the only one in the world When will I attend the show again? Because it is also precious to me I used it in a different way A short time ago a rural high school I went to asked me to give students a speech about giving hope to their dreams
since it is a hard time for juniors I thought 'Yes' This was a perfect time 
to use the envelope There were 140 kids at school so I looked for 1400 dollars I wandered around the banks
for new 10-dollar bills I went to a bank and asked to another bank to ask to another different bank visiting every bank around me They did not give me any They had in new years but they only had 50 dollar bills now So then I thought Should I give 50 dollars to each It stressed me out So I found a new way At this bank, I got 100 dollars to that bank, I got another 100 bills that way, I gathered 1400 dollars and went to visit rural kids I graduated almost 30 years ago From their point of view I was like an old grandma If I went there and say don't give up; have hope and study hard would they even listen? Even I don't like those words So I showed the envelope I am here to give you some money they started to like me since then So I told them to keep this as a 
new year money and If I become rich, 
I will bring 50 dollars for each but you won't be here by then Yes, I was gave them money, joking around Then I told them some episodes like
having a crush, getting snacks outside and such other stories Such episodes were not a big deal
but kids started to cry they cried I told them I am here to meet you I met you by chance I did not know you were here And you did not know I would come here But we are here On this huge earth, 
we met for a short time I do not know if I will remember you but this will be in you This is the same for today We might forget each other But, absolutely, we met today And this meeting 
will be on your mind somewhere I continued,
' If you felt good' as I told you this,
please do me a favor Be nice to your friend next to you Be nice to yourself This is what you need the most As I say that
kids started to cry Yes, they were crying
it also made me cry As I cry, they cried again
telling me not to cry Yes, I was there crying 
with high school students I am about to cry now, 
and this is a sort of family thing In my house, there is one
who cries a lot more than me when the sunset is beautiful,
when a flower is beautiful even when a crying kids is cute
he walks around crying I hope you understand
that I also cry easily I came here to talk about reading Reading is as same as
meeting people You read a book by chance You stumble on a phrase It is not that you decide to meet one date with the person marry become a friend It is not what you plan The book was just there in the library or a book store Its cover was simply just your style It was just at where you were staring at It is just like meeting new people A phrase from a book would fit you There is a phrase 
in poem of Jung-Jiyoung 'You just fit right to me' Just like this phrase A person might not fit with other people Only one could fit me Similarly, you will find a phrase
that fits you You might not do it
even after reading 10 books When I was an undergraduate student,
I went to many blind dates Even when I went on ten of them
to make a boyfriend I could not find one But then I met a guy by chance
walking around the campus And now I am living with him for 20 years It is the same You will happen to face an event You will find a phrase I hope you to stick with the phrase I came here today thinking about that A book You don't read because someone tell you to Do you not read because you do not know
reading a book is good? Are you not on a diet because you
do not know how to eat and exercise well? Are we missing out on ignorance? No, it is because it is hard 
and hard to do steadily You can't just do it Book is the same I tell people
that I like reading books I preach about reading As I tell this My family are checking on me My son is a 5th grader Whenever I watch drama at home 'You are watching drama 
while telling others you read' He says When reading the same page as yesterday Then he checks on me 'Is it not the page you read yesterday?' He says that to me So I got angry at him I originally love reading but as you try to control me
I hate books The situation worsened I now had to have a book at my hand
when watching drama Thus, reading a book happens only
when you like it You can read when you want to Many people think I would force to read when I am talking about reading but that is not true Even I read only when I want to But today, I would like to talk about
a book I read when I wanted to I was born in a small house in Gongju. As I was living I wondered many things since little 'Why is my name Na Min-ae?'' 'Why am I here?' I wondered a lot I asked my mother 'Mom, who am I?' She answered 'you are making nonsense' 'Just come and eat' 'My daughter' This made me think that she considers
feeding me important that she loves me that I am her daughter while eating Then, I asked my dad 'Dad, who am I?' He said 'I do not know who you are
and it is important to me to know myself' Like a rabbit from "Alice from Wonderland" Always saying 'I should write a poem' He was always busy running around He said 'I am late, I should write a poem' While saying 'It is already the time!' Where he head was school He was a primary school teacher I thought something was in school so I followed him since very little and went to school Who do you meet in school? Teachers So I asked teachers,
'Mr. Who am I?' He answered
'You are a student' 'What do students do?' He said 'they study' so I started studying I kept studying Somehow, I became good at it Why? I kept doing it Not much people do it consistently My grades improved I went to high school and top university Until now, I study And now I entered society I still do not know who I am Look at me My mother surely told me 'Eat a lot my loving daughter' She said to me What would happen my mom is not with me? I could not say 'Hello, I am my mother's loving daughter' 'Please hire me' at the job interview When I was a student I was called a good student of my grades What about after graduation? What if my grades go down? Am I being a bad person? Am I disappearing? It was a huge problem to not have "me" Do you know how you get recognized when you enter society? Your labor gets converted to money You work in a specific group,
but I realized that nothing in this group will change
even when I am not there I was just a part of a component No one will think the group is failing
because I am not there Now I went back to my fundamental question 'Why am I Na Min-ae?' 'Who am I?' 'Why am I here?' Some would think these are meaningless
as some people are too busy working to think in such ways However, the meaning can be different depending on how you think even when you eat if you think about people who cooked for you you will put more meaning into it and eat without waste The meaning can differ Thus, it became important for me to think about who I am and what I mean Furthermore, as we live the world seems to keep getting rid of me 'You are replacable' 'You are just one of many laborers' 'The world works well without you' The whole world is telling me that
I am not an absolute existence 'then why am I living here?'
I asked myself Thus, I looked for a definition of human Humans are animals that think, speak, use tools, and make society It is how dictionary describes However, there was no definition of me 'Who is Na Min-ae?' 'What is Na Min-ae?' There was no definition of 
'Why I am here?' Found out, I had to make one That is why I started reading I started by finding
a favorite phrase from a book For example, Herman Hesse says 'I just wanted to follow a path
that emerged within me' 'why was this so difficult' His name is even cool It starts with 'he' and ends with 'he' His name is 'he he' He has such a cool name but he also struggled 
with living by his will This relieved me Although I do not know who I am or I do not know what I want his words made relieved me as he also did not know Since I found a touching phrase
from his book I believed I can find another from his books Then I found a book called
"Steppenwolf" which many do not know It says there that Your true ego is a sky 
with small bright starts There is no one star in you There are various versions of you Let's look at a poem by Yoon Dong-ju One guy disliked a guy One guy pitied a guy In my mind, there is me
who I hate myself me who pity myself me who love myself and me who doubt myself There is me who encourages, 
whips, and supports me I felt better after knowing
all these different 'me' was me So I started to collect short sentences Without those, there is not much 
specific summary left in my memory Still, such sentences came into my mind and those helped me to step foward Reading a book is as same as
talking with someone This is how you could use a book I played games during my undergrad I played PC online games called starcraft Some are nodding Yes we are all getting old Anyway, when you play it you cannot see the whole room at first When you play some fights that part starts to shine There are still some games like that For example, I would listen to a NPC
that explains about the area I would then click to approve a quest As a click, the map would open I would then head there to complete Heading another place, I would listen to another NPC,
click, and open a new map As I collect these small maps and quests I head to a final destination
where the villain is at Similarly consider this as a book You read a book When you read one,
the surroundings lights up Step foward Take a sentence from the place
and keep it as your map You find another book Other lights start to shine You step forward again This way, you will keep stepping forward What I recommend you to think of Dorothy from Wizard of Oz In the movie, there is a song [music] Somewhere over the rainbow
way up high Just like the lyric, we will go up high Imagine there is something 
amazing up there you do not know what it is but you can head to the top 
little by little by reading I once experienced it and I will keep doing it What I desired the most in my life was having a guide in life What should I major in? What job should I get? What person do I want to be? I think of those and I wanted an absolute map of life telling me where to go saying that this is the right way Sometimes, parents do that job However, time passes fast and they get old Furthermore, I am a weak person in
this world filled with change and conflict that is why I go with a lot of mental sway In short, a guide in life 
does not exist at first it is what you make step by step Book is a step that makes up a map I want you to make your own map with books You might ask, 
'Why can't you do with videos?' This is how I answer Have you heard your voice in your dream? Have you heard of others' voices? I recognize that something 
is going on in my dream Oh someone is following me I am now falling I have a bread I will catch a cold if I eat this I can think while dreaming However, I do not hear others' voices In book, there is someone else beside me but I still hear my voice when I read In my favorite SF short story 
written by Kim Cho-yup, a grandmother called Anna says "I know where I need to go" I kept reading because I was touched "I know where I need to go" When I read this It is what Anna said written by the author I can hear with my voice I hear with my voice Hence, the story in the book feels like my voice in my dream as it can be played in my mind On the other hand, Youtube Should I not say that If you watch other videos or UTube you hear with other's voice For it becomes to be my voice, 
it will take more time than books Books might not seem close with you but it is very easy 
to become a part of you because you can read 
out loud with your voice This is why reading is good Moreover, Let me talk about money again Book is cost effective I do not desire travelling abroad The true travel I want is a time 
when I can stay at home alone Mothers would agree I wish my son to call me less I wish he could call me ten times without shouting until I reply Just saying "Mom!" a single time I wished it so bad that I asked my husband He agreed He takes a trip with our
two kids for 36 hours a year [crowd: wow] Yes, for 1.5 day You are all surprised Everyone is envying me I do not need a five-star hotel Just leave me alone Once in a year, they leave in the morning and come back at night next day As soon as they leave I close the door and order chicken I order fried chicken and drink with beer or coke I would eat it the whole day enjoying it While eating I would read three books that I prepared I feel so happy It is better to have books 
with different genres one novel, one essay, and one non-fiction That way, I try everything evenly And when they come back after 36 hours My face has brightened as if I had some skin care Why? I have traveled 
to 3 different places I talked with three people 
who I wanted to talk with They all read me good phrases Some of them touched me Thankfully, my husband 
has been doing that every year This year, we couldn't but I will ask him again this winter when I get tired Whenever I got tired, 
that 36-hour trip helped me a lot To all husbands here, try it to your wives Wives, ask your husbands It will be a good time Reading is not led by others It is not difficult It does not need to be fancy and awesome Just like you meet your friends 
at a brunch cafe just like you hang out just like you call that is how you should read because reading should be fun and steady Thank you for listening [applause]
